diff --git a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
index 1234567..89abcde 100644
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -880,14 +880,144 @@
-// ─── Main character draw ───────────────────────────────────────────
-
-export function drawCharacter(
-  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
-  type: CharacterType,
-  state: AnimState,
-  x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number,
-  agentId?: string,
-  currentJob?: string | null,
-) {
-  const id = agentId ?? `${type}-${Math.round(x)}`;
-  const sprite = SPRITE_MAP[type];
-  const palette = PALETTE_MAP[type];
-  const cs = getCS(id, x, y);
-  const bob = state === 'idle' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.05) * 1.2 : state === 'working' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.1) * 0.8 : 0;
-  const drawY = cs.y + bob;
-  const flipH = cs.dir === 'left';
-
-  // Drop shadow
-  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
-  ctx.beginPath();
-  ctx.ellipse(cs.x + 8 * s, drawY + sprite.length * s + 2, 7 * s, 2 * s, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
-  ctx.fill();
-
-  drawSpriteDef(ctx, sprite, palette, cs.x, drawY, s, flipH);
-
-  // Walking leg overlay
-  if (cs.moving) {
-    const lp = Math.sin(cs.wf * 0.3) * 2 * s;
-    ctx.fillStyle = palette.B;
-    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 4 * s, drawY + (sprite.length - 3) * s + lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
-    ctx.fillRect(cs.x + 9 * s, drawY + (sprite.length - 3) * s - lp, 3 * s, 2 * s);
-  }
-
-  drawStatusEffect(ctx, state, cs.x, drawY, s, frame);
-  if (agentId) {
-    updateBubble(id, state, currentJob ?? null, frame);
-    drawBubble(ctx, id, cs.x + 8 * s, drawY - 4);
-  }
-}
+// ─── Pixel art character rendering (16x24) ─────────────────────────
+
+// Character pixel data format:
+// Each character is a 16x24 grid of pixels, each pixel a color key from palette.
+// We draw outlines, shading, and details per pixel with Canvas 2D API.
+
+// Palette keys:
+// O = outline (dark)
+// S, s = skin and shaded skin
+// H, h = hair and shaded hair
+// P, p = primary clothing and shade
+// C, c = secondary clothing and shade
+// A, a = accessory and shade
+// K, k = cape and shade
+// W, w = white and light gray (eyes, teeth)
+// E = eye black
+// B, b = boots and shade
+// G, g = gold and shade
+// M, m = metal armor and shade
+// R, L, F = red, blue, green accents
+// T, t = parchment tones (for scribe/judge)
+
+// We define pixel grids for each character type with proper body proportions:
+// Head: 8x8 pixels at top
+// Torso: 8x10 pixels mid
+// Legs: 8x6 pixels bottom
+// Arms: 4x10 pixels sides
+
+// Each character type has unique colors and pixel pattern for role clarity.
+
+// Helper to draw a single pixel scaled with outline and shading
+function drawPixel(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number, color: string) {
+  ctx.fillStyle = color;
+  ctx.fillRect(x * s, y * s, s, s);
+}
+
+// Draw a pixel with outline if color is not outline
+function drawPixelWithOutline(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number, colorKey: string, palette: Record<string, string>) {
+  const outlineColor = palette.O;
+  if (colorKey === 'O') {
+    drawPixel(ctx, x, y, s, outlineColor);
+    return;
+  }
+  // Draw outline pixels around if adjacent pixels are transparent or outline
+  // For simplicity, outline pixels are drawn in sprite data as 'O'
+  // So just draw pixel color here
+  const color = palette[colorKey] || '#000000';
+  drawPixel(ctx, x, y, s, color);
+}
+
+// Draw a sprite pixel grid (array of strings) with palette at position (x,y) scaled by s
+function drawSpriteGrid(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, sprite: string[], palette: Record<string, string>, x: number, y: number, s: number, flipH: boolean) {
+  ctx.save();
+  ctx.translate(x, y);
+  if (flipH) {
+    ctx.scale(-1, 1);
+    ctx.translate(-16 * s, 0);
+  }
+  for (let py = 0; py < sprite.length; py++) {
+    const row = sprite[py];
+    for (let px = 0; px < row.length; px++) {
+      const c = row[px];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      drawPixelWithOutline(ctx, px, py, s, c, palette);
+    }
+  }
+  ctx.restore();
+}
+

+
+// Palettes for each character type
+const CHAR_PALETTES: Record<CharacterType, Record<string, string>> = {
+  king: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.gold[4], P.crimson[3], P.gold[3], P.gold[2], P.crimson[4]),
+  nobility: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.royal[4], P.crimson[3], P.gold[2], P.gold[3]),
+  knight: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.dark[4], P.stone[4], P.metal[3], P.stone[3]),
+  squire: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.crimson[3], P.wood[3], P.stone[2], P.wood[2]),
+  healer: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.forest[4], P.wood[3], P.gold[3], P.forest[3]),
+  sentinel: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.dark[3], P.stone[3], P.metal[2], P.stone[2]),
+  scribe: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.wood[3], P.t[3] || '#f5e6ca', P.gold[2], P.gold[3]),
+  judge: charPalette(P.skin[3], P.wood[3], P.gold[3], P.t[3] || '#f5e6ca', P.gold[2]),
+  blacksmith: charPalette(P.skin[2], P.dark[3], P.stone[4], P.metal[4], P.stone[3]),
+};
+
+export function drawCharacter(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  type: CharacterType,
+  state: AnimState,
+  x: number, y: number, s: number, frame: number,
+  agentId?: string,
+  currentJob?: string | null,
+) {
+  const id = agentId ?? `${type}-${Math.round(x)}`;
+  const sprite = CHAR_SPRITES[type];
+  const palette = CHAR_PALETTES[type];
+  const cs = getCS(id, x, y);
+  const bob = state === 'idle' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.05) * 1.2 : state === 'working' ? Math.sin(frame * 0.1) * 0.8 : 0;
+  const drawY = cs.y + bob;
+  const flipH = cs.dir === 'left';
+
+  // Drop shadow ellipse under feet
+  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
+  ctx.beginPath();
+  ctx.ellipse(cs.x + 8 * s, drawY + 24 * s + 2, 7 * s, 2 * s, 0
